attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SOL.SS_CODE BK_SS_CD
,COALESCE(STEX.BILL_SCHEDULE_NUMBER,-999) BK_BILLING_SCHEDULE_NUM_INT
,COALESCE(NAT.AR_TRX_KEY,-999) AR_TRX_KEY
,COALESCE(STEX.CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK') BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
,COALESCE(STEX.BILL_SCHEDULE_ID,'UNKNOWN') BILLING_SCHEDULE_BATCH_ID
,COALESCE(STEX.BILL_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') BILLING_STATUS_NAME
,COALESCE(STEX.BILL_AMOUNT,0) BILL_LOCAL_AMT
,COALESCE(STEX.BILL_QUANTITY,0) INVOICED_PRODUCT_QTY
,COALESCE(STEX.INVOICE_AMOUNT,0) INVOICE_LOCAL_AMT
,CAST(CAST(STEX.BILL_PERIOD_START_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) BILLING_TERM_START_DTM
,CAST(STEX.BILL_PERIOD_START_DATE AS DATE) DV_BILLING_TERM_START_DT
,CAST(CAST(STEX.BILL_PERIOD_END_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) BILLING_TERM_END_DTM
,CAST(STEX.BILL_PERIOD_END_DATE AS DATE) DV_BILLING_TERM_END_DT
,CAST(CAST(STEX.BILL_RELEASE_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) BILL_REL_TO_INVOICING_DTM
,CAST(STEX.BILL_RELEASE_DATE AS DATE) DV_BILL_REL_TO_INVOICING_DT
,COALESCE(CAST(CAST(STEX.INVOICE_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) INVOICE_DTM
,COALESCE(CAST(STEX.INVOICE_DATE AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) DV_INVOICE_DT
,CAST(CAST(EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM 
(
SELECT BILL_SCHEDULE_NUMBER, BILL_SCHEDULE_ID, BILL_PERIOD_END_DATE, BILL_PERIOD_START_DATE, BILL_STATUS, CURRENCY_CODE,
BILL_AMOUNT, BILL_RELEASE_DATE, BILL_QUANTITY ,INVOICE_AMOUNT,INVOICE_DATE, INVOICE_NUMBER, HEADER_ID ,LINE_ID,
LINE_REF_NUMBER ,ORDER_ORIGIN, RECORD_OFFSET ,EDW_CREATE_DTM                
FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_BILLING_SCHEDULE 


UNION ALL

SELECT BILL_SCHEDULE_NUMBER, BILL_SCHEDULE_ID, BILL_PERIOD_END_DATE, BILL_PERIOD_START_DATE, BILL_STATUS, CURRENCY_CODE,
BILL_AMOUNT, BILL_RELEASE_DATE, BILL_QUANTITY ,INVOICE_AMOUNT,INVOICE_DATE, INVOICE_NUMBER, HEADER_ID ,LINE_ID,
LINE_REF_NUMBER ,ORDER_ORIGIN, RECORD_OFFSET ,EDW_CREATE_DTM                
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXOPL_BILLING_SCHEDULE 


)STEX

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL 
ON SOL.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT=STEX.LINE_ID
AND SOL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM=STEX.LINE_REF_NUMBER
AND SOL.SS_CODE='OPL'
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
ON NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER=STEX.INVOICE_NUMBER
AND NAT.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME ='BSFT-ORDERS'
AND NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND SOL.SS_CODE='OPL'

SELECT 
 ST.BILL_SCHEDULE_NUMBER          
,ST.BILL_SCHEDULE_ID              
,ST.BILL_PERIOD_END_DATE          
,ST.BILL_PERIOD_START_DATE        
,ST.BILL_STATUS                   
,ST.CURRENCY_CODE                 
,ST.BILL_AMOUNT                   
,ST.BILL_RELEASE_DATE             
,ST.BILL_QUANTITY                 
,ST.INVOICE_AMOUNT                
,ST.INVOICE_DATE                  
,ST.INVOICE_NUMBER                
,ST.HEADER_ID                     
,ST.LINE_ID                       
,ST.LINE_REF_NUMBER               
,ST.ORDER_ORIGIN                  
,ST.RECORD_OFFSET                 
,ST.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_BILLING_SCHEDULE ST
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT W.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,W.BK_BILLING_SCHEDULE_NUM_INT FROM $$WORKDB.W_PERIODIC_BILLING_SCHEDULE W
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL 
ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=W.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND W.BK_BILLING_SCHEDULE_NUM_INT=ST.BILL_SCHEDULE_NUMBER
AND SOL.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT=ST.LINE_ID
AND SOL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM=ST.LINE_REF_NUMBER
AND SOL.SS_CODE='OPL')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BILL_SCHEDULE_NUMBER,BILL_SCHEDULE_ID,LINE_ID ORDER BY EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC) = 1

SELECT 
ST.SO_HEADER_ID                  ,
ST.SO_LINE_ID                    ,
ST.BILL_SCHEDULE_NUMBER          ,
ST.BILL_SCHEDULE_ID              ,
ST.BILL_PERIOD_START_DATE        ,
ST.BILL_PERIOD_END_DATE          ,
ST.BILL_STATUS_CODE              ,
ST.CURRENCY_CODE                 ,
ST.BILL_AMOUNT                   ,
ST.BILL_QUANTITY                 ,
ST.BILL_RELEASE_DATE             ,
ST.CREATED_BY                    ,
ST.CREATION_DATE                 ,
ST.LAST_UPDATED_BY               ,
ST.LAST_UPDATED_DATE             ,
ST.PROGRAM_ID                    ,
ST.LAST_LOGIN_ID                 ,
ST.INVOICE_NUMBER                ,
ST.INVOICE_DATE                                 
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_XXGCO_OE_INVOICE_SCHEDULES ST
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT W.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,W.BK_BILLING_SCHEDULE_NUM_INT FROM $$WORKDB.W_PERIODIC_BILLING_SCHEDULE W
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL 
ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=W.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND W.BK_BILLING_SCHEDULE_NUM_INT=ST.BILL_SCHEDULE_NUMBER
AND SOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=ST.SO_LINE_ID
AND SOL.SS_CODE='CG')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BILL_SCHEDULE_NUMBER,BILL_SCHEDULE_ID,SO_LINE_ID ORDER BY CREATION_DATE DESC) = 1

SELECT 
 SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SOL.SS_CODE BK_SS_CD 
,COALESCE(STEX.BILL_SCHEDULE_NUMBER,-999) BK_BILLING_SCHEDULE_NUM_INT
,COALESCE(NAT.AR_TRX_KEY,-999) AR_TRX_KEY
,COALESCE(STEX.CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK') BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
,COALESCE(STEX.BILL_SCHEDULE_ID,'UNKNOWN') BILLING_SCHEDULE_BATCH_ID
,COALESCE(STEX.BILL_STATUS_CODE,'UNKNOWN') BILLING_STATUS_NAME
,COALESCE(STEX.BILL_AMOUNT,0) BILL_LOCAL_AMT
,CASE WHEN NAT.AR_TRX_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(STEX.BILL_QUANTITY,0) 
 ELSE 0 END INVOICED_PRODUCT_QTY
,CASE WHEN NAT.AR_TRX_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(STEX.BILL_AMOUNT,0) ELSE 0 END INVOICE_LOCAL_AMT
,CAST(CAST(STEX.BILL_PERIOD_START_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) BILLING_TERM_START_DTM
,CAST(STEX.BILL_PERIOD_START_DATE AS DATE) DV_BILLING_TERM_START_DT
,CAST(CAST(STEX.BILL_PERIOD_END_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) BILLING_TERM_END_DTM
,CAST(STEX.BILL_PERIOD_END_DATE AS DATE) DV_BILLING_TERM_END_DT
,CAST(CAST(STEX.BILL_RELEASE_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) BILL_REL_TO_INVOICING_DTM
,CAST(STEX.BILL_RELEASE_DATE AS DATE) DV_BILL_REL_TO_INVOICING_DT
,COALESCE(CAST(CAST(STEX.INVOICE_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) INVOICE_DTM
,COALESCE(CAST(STEX.INVOICE_DATE AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) DV_INVOICE_DT
,CAST(CAST(CREATION_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM 
(
SELECT BILL_SCHEDULE_NUMBER, BILL_SCHEDULE_ID, BILL_PERIOD_END_DATE, BILL_PERIOD_START_DATE, BILL_STATUS_CODE, CURRENCY_CODE,
BILL_AMOUNT, BILL_RELEASE_DATE, BILL_QUANTITY ,INVOICE_DATE, INVOICE_NUMBER, SO_HEADER_ID ,SO_LINE_ID,CREATION_DATE                
FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXGCO_OE_INVOICE_SCHEDULES 

UNION ALL

SELECT BILL_SCHEDULE_NUMBER, BILL_SCHEDULE_ID, BILL_PERIOD_END_DATE, BILL_PERIOD_START_DATE, BILL_STATUS_CODE, CURRENCY_CODE,
BILL_AMOUNT, BILL_RELEASE_DATE, BILL_QUANTITY ,INVOICE_DATE, INVOICE_NUMBER, SO_HEADER_ID ,SO_LINE_ID,CREATION_DATE                
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXGCO_OE_INVOICE_SCHEDULES 
)STEX

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL 
ON SOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=STEX.SO_LINE_ID
AND SOL.SS_CODE='CG'
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
ON NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER=STEX.INVOICE_NUMBER
AND NAT.SS_CODE='CG'
QUALIFY Row_Number() Over(PARTITION BY SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SOL.SS_CODE,STEX.BILL_SCHEDULE_NUMBER ORDER BY NAT.AR_TRX_KEY DESC)=1
